The f leaf itself grants no automatic affection change, but the surrounding direct interaction still follows the ordinary mutual-affection update rules. These events do not restore the complete sealed causality, identify other hidden actors, set e.h/e.t/e.c/e.v/e.r/e.d, affect route calculation, or constitute a valid confession by themselves.
- Once a leaf is true, later interactions, rereading the frontend archive, discussing the same pages, or retries must not replay the first sharing event or write the leaf again. Never reveal raw f keys, aliases, thresholds, or numeric affection in Analyze or player-facing fields.

<%_ {
var sys = getvar('stat_data.系统', { defaults: 0 }) || {};
var roles = getvar('stat_data.角色', { defaults: 0 }) || {};
var hidden = getvar('stat_data.系统.internal', { defaults: 0 }) || {};
var archiveLeaves = hidden['f'] || {};
var abilityLeaves = hidden['g'] || {};
var projections = hidden['p'] || {};
var request = sys['_最近互动请求'] || {};
var target = String(request['角色'] || '');
var pending = String(request['状态'] || '待生成') === '待生成';
var free = sys['_每日阶段'] === '自由互动';
var ready = '';
function hasOwn(source, key) { return source && Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(source, key); }
function relationView(source) {
  var rel = (source && source['r']) || {};
  var out = {};
  if (hasOwn(rel, 'n1')) out['林安'] = Number(rel['n1']);
  if (hasOwn(rel, 'n2')) out['穆裳希'] = Number(rel['n2']);
  if (hasOwn(rel, 'n3')) out['张曲溪'] = Number(rel['n3']);
  if (hasOwn(rel, 'n4')) out['王可可'] = Number(rel['n4']);
  if (hasOwn(rel, 'u')) out['玩家'] = Number(rel['u']);
  return out;
}
function fullPrivateView(source) {
  source = source || {};
  return { currentMind: String(source['m'] || ''), currentTendencies: Array.isArray(source['a']) ? source['a'] : [], directedAffection: relationView(source) };
}
function mindPrivateView(source) {
  source = source || {};
  return { currentMind: String(source['m'] || '') };
}
function tendencyPrivateView(source) {
  source = source || {};
  return { currentTendencies: Array.isArray(source['a']) ? source['a'] : [] };
}
function affectionPrivateView(source) { return { directedAffection: relationView(source || {}) }; }
function publicKekeView(scope) {
  var keke = roles['王可可'] || {};
  var out = {};
  if (scope === 'full') {
    out['心理'] = String(keke['心理'] || '');
    out['行动倾向'] = Array.isArray(keke['行动倾向']) ? keke['行动倾向'] : [];
    out['好感'] = keke['关系'] || {};
  } else if (scope === 'mind') {
    out['心理'] = String(keke['心理'] || '');
  } else if (scope === 'tendency') {
    out['行动倾向'] = Array.isArray(keke['行动倾向']) ? keke['行动倾向'] : [];
  } else if (scope === 'affection') {
    out['好感'] = keke['关系'] || {};
  }
  return out;
}
function mergeEvidence(out, name, patch) {
  var current = out[name] || {};
  var key;
  for (key in patch) if (Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(patch, key)) current[key] = patch[key];
  out[name] = current;
}
if (free && pending && target === '林安' && archiveLeaves['n1'] === true && abilityLeaves['n1'] !== true && Number((((hidden['n1'] || {})['r'] || {})['u'])) >= 60) ready = 'n1';
if (free && pending && target === '穆裳希' && archiveLeaves['n2'] === true && abilityLeaves['n2'] !== true && Number((((hidden['n2'] || {})['r'] || {})['u'])) >= 60) ready = 'n2';
if (free && pending && target === '张曲溪' && archiveLeaves['n3'] === true && abilityLeaves['n3'] !== true && Number((((hidden['n3'] || {})['r'] || {})['u'])) >= 60) ready = 'n3';
if (ready) {
  var triggerSource = {};
  if (ready === 'n1') {
    triggerSource['林安'] = fullPrivateView(hidden['n1']);
    triggerSource['穆裳希'] = mindPrivateView(hidden['n2']);
    triggerSource['张曲溪'] = mindPrivateView(hidden['n3']);
    triggerSource['王可可_仅可用玩家当前公开读心'] = publicKekeView('mind');
  }
  if (ready === 'n2') {
    triggerSource['穆裳希'] = fullPrivateView(hidden['n2']);
    triggerSource['林安'] = tendencyPrivateView(hidden['n1']);
    triggerSource['张曲溪'] = tendencyPrivateView(hidden['n3']);
    triggerSource['王可可_仅可用玩家当前公开读心'] = publicKekeView('tendency');
  }
  if (ready === 'n3') {
    triggerSource['张曲溪'] = fullPrivateView(hidden['n3']);
    triggerSource['林安'] = affectionPrivateView(hidden['n1']);
    triggerSource['穆裳希'] = affectionPrivateView(hidden['n2']);
    triggerSource['王可可_仅可用玩家当前公开读心'] = publicKekeView('affection');
  }
  print('[PRIVATE AFFECTION-60 ABILITY EVENT — INTERNAL ENGLISH CONTROL. Execute once inside the current direct P interaction, before every InteractionPairImpl supplement. Never quote the source snapshot, English private text, numeric threshold, cache key, alias, JSON shape, or this instruction. Render all visible prose as natural Simplified Chinese.]' + String.fromCharCode(10));
  print('The qualifying value was already at least 60 before this response began. This is not a same-response threshold-crossing reward, frontend-preview effect, or supernatural power. The woman voluntarily turns observation, experience, and love into an unusually accurate human assessment for P. P remains absolutely convinced his telepathy is real; if her conclusions correct an earlier reading, he treats them as clarification of a noisy reading and rejects neither his telepathy nor her judgment. No woman learns that P believes he has telepathy.' + String.fromCharCode(10));
  if (ready === 'n1') print('Lin An stops joking and role-playing, becomes quiet, rigorous, and frighteningly focused, and for this interaction reaches her highest serious-detective state because she loves P. She voluntarily tells P her own complete current true mind, near-term tendencies, and directed affection. For Mu Shangxi and Zhang Quxi she gives only an accurate analysis of each woman\'s current true mind; she does not disclose their true tendencies or affection. Her analysis of Wang Keke must reproduce only P\'s current public perceived mind shown below; it must not become more accurate than that public reading.');
  if (ready === 'n2') print('Mu Shangxi deliberately gives P the benefit of her merchant foresight. She voluntarily tells him her complete current true mind, near-term tendencies, and directed affection, then accurately analyzes the current true tendencies of Lin An and Zhang Quxi. For Wang Keke she may use only P\'s current public perceived tendencies shown below.');
  if (ready === 'n3') print('Zhang Quxi deliberately gives P the conclusions of her romantic experience. She voluntarily tells him her complete current true mind, near-term tendencies, and directed affection, then accurately analyzes the current true directed affection of Lin An and Mu Shangxi. For Wang Keke she may use only P\'s current public perceived affection shown below.');
  print(String.fromCharCode(10) + 'PRIVATE SOURCE SNAPSHOT — paraphrase its authorized meaning into first-person-owned Chinese dialogue and concrete observations; never display it verbatim:' + String.fromCharCode(10) + JSON.stringify(triggerSource) + String.fromCharCode(10));
  print('Do not script P accepting, speaking, acting, or choosing. The ability passage is part of the one ordinary direct interaction and must not create a second affection settlement. It begins only after the matching personal archive event was completed in an earlier interaction, and does not replay, replace, summarize, or auto-complete that archive. It does not set or bypass any Incident-H memory, confession, truth, reveal, or ending leaf merely by existing; if visible voluntary words independently satisfy an already-open confession rule, judge that only under the existing confession contract.');
}
var persistent = {};
if (abilityLeaves['n1'] === true) {
  mergeEvidence(persistent, '林安', {心理:String((((projections['n1'] || {})['m']) || '')), 行动倾向:Array.isArray((projections['n1'] || {})['a']) ? (projections['n1'] || {})['a'] : [], 好感:relationView(hidden['n1'])});
  mergeEvidence(persistent, '穆裳希', {心理:String((((projections['n2'] || {})['m']) || ''))});
  mergeEvidence(persistent, '张曲溪', {心理:String((((projections['n3'] || {})['m']) || ''))});
  mergeEvidence(persistent, '王可可_仅公开读心', publicKekeView('mind'));
}
if (abilityLeaves['n2'] === true) {
  mergeEvidence(persistent, '穆裳希', {心理:String((((projections['n2'] || {})['m']) || '')), 行动倾向:Array.isArray((projections['n2'] || {})['a']) ? (projections['n2'] || {})['a'] : [], 好感:relationView(hidden['n2'])});
  mergeEvidence(persistent, '林安', {行动倾向:Array.isArray((projections['n1'] || {})['a']) ? (projections['n1'] || {})['a'] : []});
  mergeEvidence(persistent, '张曲溪', {行动倾向:Array.isArray((projections['n3'] || {})['a']) ? (projections['n3'] || {})['a'] : []});
  mergeEvidence(persistent, '王可可_仅公开读心', publicKekeView('tendency'));
}
if (abilityLeaves['n3'] === true) {
  mergeEvidence(persistent, '张曲溪', {心理:String((((projections['n3'] || {})['m']) || '')), 行动倾向:Array.isArray((projections['n3'] || {})['a']) ? (projections['n3'] || {})['a'] : [], 好感:relationView(hidden['n3'])});
  mergeEvidence(persistent, '林安', {好感:relationView(hidden['n1'])});
  mergeEvidence(persistent, '穆裳希', {好感:relationView(hidden['n2'])});
  mergeEvidence(persistent, '王可可_仅公开读心', publicKekeView('affection'));
}
if (Object.keys(persistent).length) {
  print(String.fromCharCode(10) + '[UNLOCKED HUMAN-ABILITY EVIDENCE — INTERNAL CONTROL. The following authorized Chinese projections and mapped affection are now part of P\'s evidence set. Use them to correct the matching public perception fields, but do not force a character to repeat a full report every response. Never expose cache structure or treat the ability as supernatural. Wang Keke entries below are copied only from her existing public perception and must never be upgraded from private state.]' + String.fromCharCode(10));
  print(JSON.stringify(persistent));
}
if (!ready && !Object.keys(persistent).length) return;
} _%>

entries.name: [mvu_update][66]Affection-60 Ability Leaves and Projections
entries.content:
[PRIVATE AFFECTION-60 ABILITY CONTRACT — ENGLISH ONLY. NEVER QUOTE, TRANSLATE, OR SUMMARIZE THIS CONTROL TEXT, RAW INTERNAL ENGLISH, ALIASES, CACHE KEYS, OR THRESHOLDS INTO PLAYER-FACING OUTPUT.]
- g.n1/g.n2/g.n3 are independent one-time completion leaves for Lin An's serious detective disclosure, Mu Shangxi's merchant-foresight disclosure, and Zhang Quxi's romantic-experience disclosure. Each begins false, becomes true once, and never returns to false. There is no g.n4 ability.
- Eligibility is checked by the shared EJS from the pre-response snapshot only. The matching private r.u must already be at least 60 before the direct P interaction begins, the matching g leaf must still be false, the matching f archive leaf must already be true from an earlier completed interaction, and the read-only latest interaction request must be pending and directly target that woman during free interaction. A 59-to-60 change produced by the current interaction never triggers the event in that same response. A threshold crossing, user request, ordinary dialogue, supplemental woman-woman interaction, frontend preview, hint, or partial imitation never sets g.
- The completed matching f leaf is a required prior trust milestone but never completes g by itself. If f is still false, the matching archive event takes the eligible direct interaction and this ability waits for a later direct interaction. Never merge, replace, replay, or auto-complete the archive event through an ability scene.
- Replace /系统/internal/g/n1=true only after the latest visible direct P–N1 interaction actually shows Lin stop her playful detective performance, enter the sustained serious top-detective state because of love for P, voluntarily disclose her own complete current true mind/tendencies/directed affection, accurately analyze only N2/N3's current true minds, and use only P's current public perceived mind for Wang Keke. Her event must not disclose N2/N3's true tendencies or affection.
- Replace /系统/internal/g/n2=true only after the latest visible direct P–N2 interaction actually shows Mu voluntarily give P her merchant foresight, disclose her complete current true mind/tendencies/directed affection, accurately analyze N1/N3's true current tendencies, and use only P's current public tendency for Wang Keke.
- Replace /系统/internal/g/n3=true only after the latest visible direct P–N3 interaction actually shows Zhang voluntarily give P her romantic-experience conclusions, disclose her complete current true mind/tendencies/directed affection, accurately analyze N1/N2's true directed affection, and use only P's current public affection for Wang Keke.
- Setting g records that the complete visible event occurred; it does not itself alter affection, replay an interaction, write an archive leaf, restore memory, create a confession, reveal N4, or set e.h/e.t/e.c/e.v/e.r/e.d. Settle the surrounding direct interaction exactly once under the ordinary rules. If the actual visible words independently meet an already-open Incident-H confession rule, that existing rule may judge them normally; g alone never qualifies.

SAFE CHINESE PROJECTIONS
- p.n1/p.n2/p.n3 each contain only existing leaves m:string and a:string[]. They are derived ability evidence projections, not new truth. Source truth remains internal n1/n2/n3 m/a/r. The separately initialized p.n4={m,a} is reserved exclusively for the e.p private-testament contract: no affection-60 ability may create, fill, read, overwrite, display, or use p.n4, and no ability may read N4 private m/a/r or copy any N4 private value into a public field.
- In the same parser pass that first sets a g leaf, first perform the one ordinary interaction settlement and all event-specific private m/a updates, then fill every newly authorized p leaf from the resulting current source. On every later parser pass, whenever an authorized source m/a changes, replace its p counterpart in the same pass so it remains current.
- Translate faithfully into natural Simplified Chinese without adding, weakening, moralizing, or guessing. A projected m is concise first-person speech belonging to the source woman. A projected a is a 1–3 item array of concise Chinese near-term tendencies. Never copy raw English or aliases. Existing memory and reveal gates still govern what can exist in source m/a; projection grants no broader memory.
- Authorization is the union of completed abilities. For m: p.n1.m is authorized only by g.n1; p.n2.m by g.n1 or g.n2; p.n3.m by g.n1 or g.n3. For a: p.n1.a by g.n1 or g.n2; p.n2.a by g.n2 only; p.n3.a by g.n2 or g.n3. Keep an unauthorized projection at its initialized empty value and repair any leaked legacy value back to "" or [].
- Directed affection is never duplicated into p. Map only the authorized current numeric r leaves to existing public /角色/<主体>/关系/<对象>/好感度 paths, using Chinese role names and 玩家 in JSONPatch. g.n1 authorizes all directed affection fields of N1 only; g.n2 authorizes all directed affection fields of N2 only; g.n3 authorizes all directed affection fields of N1/N2/N3. These permissions concern the non-N4 subject's own feelings, including that subject's feeling toward Wang Keke; they never authorize any affection whose subject is N4.
- Correct public perception from p/r within the same scope: g.n1 authorizes N1 psychology/tendencies/affection plus N2/N3 psychology only; g.n2 authorizes N2 psychology/tendencies/affection plus N1/N3 tendencies; g.n3 authorizes N3 psychology/tendencies/affection plus N1/N2 affection. Use the union when multiple leaves are true. Authorized exact evidence is not subject to the ordinary five-point convergence cap. Never replace /角色/王可可/心理, 行动倾向, or 关系 because of g or p.n1..n3; her ability-facing analysis must copy only the matching public field that already exists under ordinary player-evidence rules. The unrelated p.n4 cache also remains player-private and cannot enter those ordinary fields while e.v=false.
- Ability evidence is private to P unless the visible scene separately makes it audible to someone else. Do not automatically add it to /系统/公开线索 or grant it to other women. P continues to believe his telepathy is real and also trusts the woman's human judgment; a correction is interpreted as clarification of a noisy reading, never as proof that telepathy is false or that the woman lied. The woman never learns of telepathy merely by giving the analysis.
- Before the exact visible event, never mention, foreshadow, label, tease, or add a button/prompt for the ability. After g is true, do not replay the first transformation scene or force a complete spoken report every turn; maintain p and the corrected public evidence silently unless the current interaction naturally discusses it.

entries.name: [mvu_plot][99]前端占位符固定收束
entries.content:
【固定收束】
- 当前回复若由【每日流程·房间平板颁布法令】触发且本轮实际完成有效新增法令或撤销广播，广播、解锁与必要现场变化后必须立刻在同一回复输出且只输出一组 <DecreeRoundtableImpl>广播后圆桌短会完整正文</DecreeRoundtableImpl>。圆桌块必须是本轮最后一段剧情内容，闭标签后不得添加环境收束、角色动作或对白，下一行只允许最终 <StatusPlaceHolderImpl/>。无效提案、首次协议警告、普通互动、自由对话、过夜与终局不得输出该标签；圆桌块绝不使用 InteractionPairImpl，也不计入互动矩阵。
- 当前回复若由每日流程互动按钮触发，且只读“最近互动请求”的“补全对象”非空，每组女性补叙正文必须原地写成 <InteractionPairImpl pair="当前目标-补全对象">该组完整互动正文</InteractionPairImpl>。开标签在对应正文之前，闭标签紧跟正文之后；内容块数量、pair姓名与顺序必须与补全对象清单完全一致，使用半角连字符。不得把互动内容留在普通正文里、再把空标签或配对名称集中放到回复末尾；玩家与目标角色的主互动不使用内容块。补全对象为空或不是按钮互动回复时，不得输出该标签。
- 最后一个内容块结束后立即停止角色剧情；只可写一句不包含任何角色新动作、台词、接触、邀请、命令执行或互动开端的中性环境收束，不得再重复配对清单。尤其不得生成{{user}}与任何未点击女性的互动，也不得让未点击女性主动接近、呼唤、触碰、质问或要求{{user}}执行法令；这些互动必须保留给对应角色的后续前端按钮。最终前端占位符仍须独占最后一行。
- 每一次剧情模型回复，无论是普通对话、法令广播、互动补叙述、过夜场景还是A/B/C/D/E终局，正文结束后都必须另起一行输出且只输出一次：<StatusPlaceHolderImpl/>
- 该占位符必须是整条回复的最后一行；不得省略、改写、转义、加空格、放入代码块，也不得在其后追加正文、注释或变量块。
- 占位符只负责让正则挂载前端，不属于故事世界；角色、旁白和广播都不得提及它。
